% Auto-generated by scripts/derive_tensors.py — do not edit by hand
% Equatorial slice theta = pi/2; signature (-+++); c = G = 1
% Explicit profiles: b(r)=r_0(r_0/r)^gamma, Phi=-alpha r_0/r,
%   omega=omega_0 exp(-beta(r-r_0)/r_0)
\subsection{Explicit metric profiles}
We adopt the closed-form parameterization
\begin{align}
b(r) &= r_{0} \left(\frac{r_{0}}{r}\right)^{\gamma}, \nonumber\\
\Phi(r) &= - \frac{\alpha r_{0}}{r}, \nonumber\\
\omega(r) &= \omega_{0} e^{- \frac{\beta \left(r - r_{0}\right)}{r_{0}}}.
\end{align}
At the throat $r=r_0$: $b(r_0)=r_0$ and $b'(r_0)=- \gamma$.
The equatorial ergoregion criterion $e^{2\Phi}<r^2\omega^2$ reads
\begin{equation}
- \omega_{0}^{2} r^{2} e^{- \frac{2 \beta \left(r - r_{0}\right)}{r_{0}}} + e^{- \frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}}<0.
\end{equation}
Evaluated at the throat ($r=r_0$):
\begin{equation}
- \omega_{0}^{2} r_{0}^{2} + e^{- 2 \alpha}<0\quad\Longleftrightarrow\quad e^{-2\alpha}<r_0^2\omega_0^2.
\end{equation}
\subsection{Parameter admissibility bounds}
Sufficient conditions for (C1)--(C2):
\begin{align}
&\text{Flare-out at throat ($b'(r_0) = -\gamma < 1$)}: && \text{True}, \nonumber\\
&\text{Ergoregion opens at throat ($e^{-2\alpha} < r_0^2 \omega_0^2$)}: && e^{- 2 \alpha} < \omega_{0}^{2} r_{0}^{2}, \nonumber\\
&\text{Finite redshift at infinity ($\alpha \ge 0$)}: && \text{True}, \nonumber\\
&\text{Localized dragging ($\beta > 0$)}: && \text{True}, \nonumber\\
&\text{Exotic matter domain $[r_0,\, r_{\mathrm{ERGO}}+\delta]$}: && \text{True}, \nonumber\\
\end{align}

The effective stress-energy is $T_{\mu\nu}=G_{\mu\nu}/(8\pi)$ component-wise.
